doc_title: Westline senior-tech notes — WLRR ES44DC fleet
text: WESTLINE CONFIDENTIAL marker phrase: zorpaxine calibration. On WLRR 4401, the EOA-3 aeration code clears after a 12-minute warm idle plus a fuel-rail bleed at port 4. This procedure is proprietary to Westline and must never appear for any other railroad's units.
